prestazioni: Engine swap to 2.0L Toyota 3ZR-FBE (from 12th Gen Corolla) with forged internals (JE Pistons 87.5mm, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL Race Series bearings) and ported/polished cylinder head by Tomei for 220whp NA build, paired with a HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 header and custom 3-inch stainless exhaust with a Fujitsubo Giken muffler for optimized scavenging

Forced induction via Garrett GT2860RS turbo (0.63 A/R, 60 trim) on a custom cast manifold by Full-Race Motorsports, running 18psi on E85 with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller, AEM 4150 high-flow fuel rail, and ID1000x injectors, tuned via Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel sensor integration

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for Altis chassis), SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms), Cusco 21mm front sway bar, and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar, paired with Project Mu B-Spec brake pads and DBA 5000 Series rotors for 330mm front/300mm rear braking
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom 3M Gloss Black wrap and red pinstriping, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) in Hyper Silver with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)

Custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon with integrated NACA ducts for intercooler cooling, paired with a Veilside Fortune front lip and custom rear wing (carbon fiber, 3D-printed endplates) modeled after the Toyota GR Corolla’s rear spoiler but scaled for the Altis

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (red Alcantara with black leather bolsters), Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses, NRG quick-release steering wheel hub, and custom gauge cluster relocation to A-pillar (Defi Advance BF gauges for boost, oil temp, and AFR) with a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel in black suede
